title: Banff Trail Duplex STR
definition: Duplex STR near Banff Trail modeled at exact break-even — $0/month after simplified costs; reality rarely lands on zero, so treat as fragile.

not_ideal_for: Those needing positive cash day one

faq.a: It is a modeling midpoint; most owners see small positive or negative swings.
Neighbor relations and joint maintenance — costs are not always evenly predictable.

faq.q: Where to read about break-even investing?
faq.a: See the break-even scenario page under /scenarios/.
